name: ai-office-3
description: AI-Office 3.0 - 内置文档引擎重构工作副本
author: AI-Office Team

scripts.dev:web:full: concurrently -n web,server -c cyan,yellow "npm run dev:web" "npm run dev:server"
scripts.check:web: npm run typecheck && npm run build:web
scripts.check:all: npm run check:web && npm run build:electron && npm run check:server
scripts.smoke:ooxml: rm -rf .tmp-smoke && npx tsc --target ES2022 --module NodeNext --moduleResolution NodeNext --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck --outDir .tmp-smoke build/run-ooxml-roundtrip-smoke.ts electron/main/services/documentEngineService.ts && node .tmp-smoke/build/run-ooxml-roundtrip-smoke.js && rm -rf .tmp-smoke
scripts.smoke:ooxml-snapshot: rm -rf .tmp-smoke && npx tsc --target ES2022 --module NodeNext --moduleResolution NodeNext --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck --jsx react-jsx --outDir .tmp-smoke build/run-ooxml-snapshot-completeness-smoke.ts electron/main/services/generatedOoxmlSnapshot.ts electron/main/services/documentEngineService.ts src/engines/documentEngine/embeddedPaperDocument.ts src/engines/documentEngine/registry.ts src/utils/markdownToHtml.ts && node .tmp-smoke/build/run-ooxml-snapshot-completeness-smoke.js && rm -rf .tmp-smoke
scripts.smoke:paper-stream: rm -rf .tmp-smoke && npx tsc --target ES2022 --module NodeNext --moduleResolution NodeNext --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck --jsx react-jsx --outDir .tmp-smoke build/run-paper-streaming-smoke.ts src/services/PaperService.ts src/services/paperStreaming.ts src/engines/documentEngine/embeddedPaperDocument.ts src/engines/documentEngine/registry.ts src/utils/markdownToHtml.ts src/types/electron.d.ts electron/main/services/settingsStore.ts && node .tmp-smoke/build/run-paper-streaming-smoke.js && rm -rf .tmp-smoke
scripts.smoke:formal-template-ui: rm -rf .tmp-smoke && npx tsc --target ES2022 --module NodeNext --moduleResolution NodeNext --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck --jsx react-jsx --outDir .tmp-smoke build/run-formal-template-generate-ui-smoke.ts && xvfb-run -a ./node_modules/.bin/electron .tmp-smoke/run-formal-template-generate-ui-smoke.js && rm -rf .tmp-smoke
